text.title: go-concurrency Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: model fan-out, size semaphore, wire ctx, add leak detection, run -race x10.

step.name: model-the-fanout
step.input: Workload description (N items, each calls downstream X taking ~Tms).
step.action: Pick the pattern: worker pool (steady), errgroup (one-shot fan-out), semaphore (rate limiting), pipeline (stages).
step.output: One sentence stating the chosen pattern + which template to start from.
step.decision-gate: If the workload is single-shot fan-out, prefer errgroup over hand-rolled Pool.

step.name: size-bound
step.input: Downstream capacity numbers (DB pool size, API RPS, SLA).
step.action: Compute concurrency = min(downstream_capacity, target_throughput * latency_seconds). Document the derivation in a comment.
step.output: Semaphore size or worker count + comment.
step.decision-gate: If derivation lands on `runtime.NumCPU()` for an I/O-bound workload, re-derive — almost always wrong.

step.name: wire-context
step.action: Plumb ctx into every goroutine; every select includes ctx.Done(); Submit-style methods return ctx.Err() on cancellation.
step.output: Code where `grep -n "go " | grep -v ctx | grep -v cancel` returns zero hits.
step.decision-gate: If a goroutine cannot accept ctx, refactor to accept it or add a `done chan struct{}` closed by the owner.

step.name: add-leak-detection
step.decision-gate: If goleak reports leaks, fix before merging — never add Ignore directives without a documented reason.

step.name: ci-race-x10
step.action: Add the templates/ci-race.sh step; ensure `-race -count>=10` for changed concurrency packages.
step.output: CI pipeline runs the race detector on every PR.
step.decision-gate: Block merge if race detector reports any data race.
